title: When Timeline arrives and Status is not Done, change to Stuck
excerpt:
Hi 
I’m not sure why this automation isn’t working. 
When Timeline arrives and Status is not Done, change it to Stuck. 
I played around with when to notify but the status remains unchanged. 
Thanks!

posts.author: Sharon (Sharon Ng)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I’m not sure why this automation isn’t working.

When Timeline arrives and Status is not Done, change it to Stuck.

I played around with when to notify but the status remains unchanged.

Thanks!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @Sharon - Welcome to the community!

Silly question, but have you tested over a 24 hour period, to see if the automation triggers once the date changes and rolls over?.

You can also try using the trigger that happens when the date has passed for a next day action.
